title: CORE ADR document header (ADR-105 D5/D7)
description: Validates the YAML frontmatter header of an ADR under .specs/decisions/ADR-*.md. Authored by ADR-105. The prose body is unconstrained; this schema governs only the structured header block. Consumed via the `adr` artifact type's schema_ref by the .specs/ document-header validator (ADR-105 D6 hook 1, built alongside the frontmatter migration). doctrine_tier is optional for ADRs (an ADR's bindingness is carried by its accepted-decision status; the tier axis is load-bearing chiefly for papers, per the #627 finding); status is required.

supersedes.description: ADR id this supersedes (inherits its grounding), or null.

grounding.description: Grounding-paper ids. The ADR-049 D2 obligation as a typed field; the CCC enforces 'accepted ADR must declare grounding or supersedes' (ADR-105 D6 hook 2).
